source: ABC Online reports that the pilot of the plane may face charges.

foreignization: Malaysian Airlines flight MH17 was shot down over Ukraine on July 17, 2014, killing all 298 people on board. The plane was flying from Amsterdam to Kuala Lumpur. The investigation into the crash revealed that the plane was hit by a Russian-made Buk missile. The missile was fired from a area controlled by pro-Russian separatists in eastern Ukraine. The United States and other countries have accused Russia of being responsible for the attack. Russia has denied these allegations. The pilot of the plane, who was Ukrainian, may face charges for failing to follow safety procedures. However, it is unclear whether he will be charged or not. The investigation is still ongoing.

source: At least nine fossilized teeth, one canine tooth and eight molars, of a previously unknown species of apes found in Africa were discovered by a team of researchers from Ethiopia and Japan who then compared the 3-D make up of the teeth to other fossils that date back as far as 8 million years and found that the fossils are likely a "direct ancestor" of apes currently living in Africa and that the new ape fossils were that of a species of gorilla who ate mostly plants high in fiber.
domestication: Sekurang-kurangnya sembilan gigi telah difosil, satu gigi taring dan lapan gigi geraham, dari spesis beruk yang sebelum ini tidak dikenali ditemui di Afrika telah ditemui oleh kumpulan penyelidik dari Ethiopia dan Jepun yang kemudian membandingkan pembikinan 3-D gigi tersebut kepada fosil lain bertarikh sejauh 8 juta tahun belakang dan menemui yang fosil tersebut berkemungkinan "moyang terdekat" beruk yang kini hidup di Afrika dan fosil beruk baru tersebut dari spesis gorila yang makan kebanyakannya tumbuhan berserat tinggi.
foreignization: At least sembilan gigi fosil, satu gigi taring dan lapan gigi geraham, dari spesies monyet yang tidak diketahui sebelum ini yang dijumpai di Afrika oleh sebuah pasukan penyelidik dari Ethiopia dan Jepun. Mereka kemudian membandingkan komposisi 3-D gigi tersebut dengan fosil lain yang berusia sehingga 8 juta tahun dan mendapati bahawa fosil tersebut mungkin merupakan "nenek moyang langsung" monyet yang hidup di Afrika sekarang. Fosil monyet baru tersebut adalah spesies gorila yang makan terutamanya tumbuhan tinggi serat.

Malay: "Pegawai-pegawai hadir dan menemui mayat seorang gadis berusia 15 tahun."


This translation is accurate and conveys the same meaning as the original English sentence. The word "officers" is translated to "pegawai-pegawai" which is the plural form of "pegawai" meaning officer. The word "attended" is translated to "hadir" which means to be present. The word "discovered" is translated to "menemui" which means to find or discover. The word "body" is translated to "mayat" which means body. The word "15-year-old" is translated to "berusia 15 tahun" which means of age 15 years. The word "girl" is translated to "gadis" which means girl.

source: Threatening letters were sent to 20 U.S. newspapers, stating: "Goldman Sachs."

Malaysia: Surat ugutan dihantar kepada 20 akhbar AS, menyatakan: "Goldman Sachs."


Step 1: Identify the key elements of the text.
- Threatening letters
- Sent to 20 U.S. newspapers
- Stating: "Goldman Sachs"

Step 2: Translate each element into Malay.
- Threatening letters = surat ugutan
- Sent to 20 U.S. newspapers = dihantar kepada 20 akhbar AS
- Stating: "Goldman Sachs" = menyatakan: "Goldman Sachs"

Step 3: Combine the translated elements into a coherent sentence.
Surat ugutan dihantar kepada 20 akhbar AS, menyatakan: "Goldman Sachs."


The final translated text in Malay is: Surat ugutan dihantar kepada 20 akhbar AS, menyatakan: "Goldman Sachs."

source: In advance of the storm, President Gloria Arroyo issued a "state of calamity" and tens of thousands residents were advised to leave their homes.

source: The rebel group is battling for control of the war-ravaged nation against the Western-backed Transitional Federal Government, led by former Islamic insurgent Sheikh Sharif Sheikh Ahmed.
domestication: Kumpulan pemberontak yang berjuang untuk kawalan negara yang dilanda peperangan terhadap Kerajaan Persekutuan Peralihan yang disokong Barat, yang diketuai oleh bekas pemberontak Islam Sheikh Sharif Sheikh Ahmed.

source: Poor shooting doomed the Australian Gliders' hopes of a third victory in a row at the Basketball Arena; they only managed to make only 23 out of 68 shots at the basket, a miserable 34%.
domestication: Sasaran yang bermutu rendah menakdirkan nasib malang Gliders Australia dalam kemenangan ketiga berturut-turut di Arena Bola Keranjang; mereka hanya mampu untuk membuat 23 daripada 68 sasaran ke arah bakul, 34% yang amat yang sedikit.
foreignization:
English: Sesiapa yang tidak pandai menembak akan menghancurkan harapan pasukan Australia untuk menang tiga kali berturut-turut di Arena Bola Keranjang; mereka hanya berjaya membuat 23 daripada 68 tembakan ke dalam keranjang, iaitu 34% yang sangat rendah.

source: "From prison, I'll keep working, I'll keep fighting to preserve the freedom, democracy and unity of the people," said Mr Ortega in a telephone interview.

source: The airport serves as NATO's operating base for southern Afghanistan.
domestication: Lapangan terbang terbabit berfungsi sebagai pangkalan operasi NATO bagi selatan Afghanistan.
foreignization: The airport serves as NATO's operating base for southern Afghanistan.

source: Hamas won the Palestinian legislative council elections of January 2006 by a landslide and is now faced with forming a government and strained ties to European Union and the United States, which classify it as a terrorist organization responsible for several suicide attacks.
domestication: Hamas telah memenangi pilihanraya majlis undangan Palestin pada Januari 2006 dengan kemenangan majoriti dan kini sedang menghadapi pembentukan sebuah kerajaan dan hubungan tegang dengan Kesatuan Eropah dan Amerika Syarikat, yang mengklasifikasikannya sebagai organisasi pengganas yang bertanggung jawab ke atas beberapa serangan bunuh diri.
foreignization: Hamas memenangi pilihan raya majlis perundangan Palestin pada Januari 2006 dengan majoriti besar dan kini berhadapan dengan membentuk kerajaan dan hubungan yang tegang dengan Kesatuan Eropah dan Amerika Syarikat, yang mengklasifikasikan ia sebagai organisasi pengganas yang bertanggungjawab atas beberapa serangan bunuh diri.

source: After two years of campaigning, today United States citizens went to the polls to vote for the Presidency and for numerous Senate, House, state and local races across the country.

source: The Trident missile system is carried in four nuclear-powered Vanguard class submarines, the first of which was commissioned in August 1993.

source: They said the laws were unjust and the treatment of the accused was cruel and unusual, constituting torture under the terms of the UN charter.

source: Bill Burton, a spokesman for Obama, responded to the ad: "Is the biggest proponent of George Bush’s tired, failed policies ready to bring about change?"

source: "The United States is leading the way when it comes to protecting human rights and promoting human dignity."
domestication: "Amerika Syarikat akan mengetuai dalam hal-hal berkenaan pelindungan hak asasi manusia dan peningkatan maruah manusia".
foreignization:
The United States is leading the way when it comes to protecting human rights and promoting human dignity.

Step 1: Identify the main subject and action in the sentence.
- Main subject: The United States
- Main action: leading the way

Step 2: Translate the main subject and action into Malay.
- Main subject: The United States = Amerika Syarikat
- Main action: leading the way = memimpin jalan

Step 3: Add the rest of the sentence to the translation.
- Protecting human rights and promoting human dignity = melindungi hak asasi manusia dan mempromosikan martabat manusia

Step 4: Combine the translated parts to form the final translation.
- Amerika Syarikat memimpin jalan dalam melindungi hak asasi manusia dan mempromosikan martabat manusia.

Final Answer: Amerika Syarikat memimpin jalan dalam melindungi hak asasi manusia dan mempromosikan martabat manusia.

source: According to Crown Prince Naruhito this was in order to protect Crown Princess Masako.

source: However, after an investigation, health officials concluded that there was an abnormally large amount of lead circulating in the villagers' bodies.

source: He added that Corus have to achieve "long-term sustainable competitiveness in a global and over-supplied steel market".

source: The declaration is in-response to Safarov's pardon and promotion, despite the Azeri officer having been given a life sentence — with a minimum jail term of 30 years, by Hungarian authorities in 2006.

foreignization: The declaration is in-response to Safarov's pardon and promotion, despite the Azeri officer having been given a life sentence — with a minimum jail term of 30 years, by Hungarian authorities in 2006.

source: The students, seven men and three women, took control of the building of the school early yesterday morning in response to the long delay in re-construction of the liceo, following the earthquake of 2010.
domestication: Pelajar-pelajar tersebut, tujuh lelaki dan tiga perempuan, mengambil alih kawalan di bangunan sekolah tersebut awal pagi semalam sebagai respon terhadap kelewatan pembinaan semula liceo, berikutan gempa bumi pada 2010.
foreignization:
The students, seven men and three women, took control of the building of the school early yesterday morning in response to the long delay in re-construction of the liceo, following the earthquake of 2010.

Malay: Pelajar-pelajar, tujuh lelaki dan tiga wanita, mengambil kawalan bangunan sekolah awal pagi semalam sebagai tindak balas kepada kelewatan yang panjang dalam pembinaan semula liceo, susulan gempa bumi pada tahun 2010.

source: Following the meeting, a press conference was held in which Saakashvili stated that he had signed the accord.

source: Israel's High Court of Justice reversed a similar attempt to ban Balad in 2003, and has until Friday to rule on yesterday's votes.

foreignization: Malaysia: Mahkamah Agung Israel membatalkan usaha serupa untuk melarang Balad pada tahun 2003, dan mempunyai masa sehingga Jumaat untuk membuat keputusan mengenai undian semalam.

source: After what happened on Sunday we obviously reported all of that to the police and we are continuing to assist them with their inquiries, Mr Tyrus said.

foreignization: After what happened on Sunday, we obviously reported all of that to the police and we are continuing to assist them with their inquiries, Mr Tyrus said.

source: Boris Johnson, an English MP writing in The Times in London, has welcomed Muslim opposition in Britain to the events in Sudan and called for muslims to publicly demonstrate their outrage: : "the voices we need to hear now belong to Britain's vast, sensible Muslim majority..." "Their arguments will be heard with respect in Khartoum, since they cannot be said to be founded on any kind of cultural imperialism, or to be actuated by Islamophobia."
domestication: Boris Johnson, seorang Ahli Parlimen Inggeris yang menulis dalam ruangan The Times di London, telah mengalu-alukan pembangkang Islam di Britain terhadap peristiwa-peristiwa di Sudan dan menggesa umat Islam secara terbuka menunjukkan kemarahan mereka: "suara-suara yang kita perlu dengar kini milik kebanyakan majoriti Muslim Britain yang wajar..." "Hujah-hujah mereka akan didengar dengan penghormatan di Khartoum, kerana mereka tidak boleh dikatakan berasaskan apa jenis budaya imperialisme, atau digerakkan oleh Islamofobia".
foreignization: Boris Johnson, seorang MP Inggeris yang menulis di The Times di London, telah menyambut baik tentangan Muslim di Britain terhadap peristiwa di Sudan dan meminta umat Islam untuk menunjukkan kemarahan mereka secara terbuka: "Suara yang kita perlukan untuk didengar sekarang adalah dari majoriti Muslim yang besar, yang rasional di Britain..." "Argumen mereka akan didengar dengan hormat di Khartoum, kerana ia tidak dapat dikatakan berasaskan imperialisme budaya, atau digerakkan oleh Islamofobia."

source: According to USFooty, the tournament will attract over 1000 players.

foreignization: Malaysia: Menurut USFooty, kejohanan ini akan menarik lebih daripada 1000 pemain.

source: Larry Craig, the senior United States Senator for Idaho, was arrested at Minneapolis-St. Paul International Airport in Minnesota after pleading guilty to a charge of disorderly conduct.

foreignization: Larry Craig, senator senior Amerika Syarikat untuk Idaho, ditangkap di Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa Minneapolis-St. Paul di Minnesota selepas mengaku bersalah atas tuduhan gangguan gangguan.

source: In October of 2008, Iceland's banking sector collapsed and was largely nationalised.

source: The National Weather Service has posted Excessive Heat Warnings for many of the cities in the eastern seaboard that do not normally experience this type of dangerously hot weather.

foreignization: Malaysia tidak mempunyai perkhidmatan cuaca nasional yang sama seperti di Amerika Syarikat, tetapi kita mempunyai Jabatan Meteorologi Malaysia (MetMalaysia) yang menyediakan ramalan cuaca untuk negara kita. Jika ada amaran cuaca panas melampau (Excessive Heat Warning) di Amerika Syarikat, ia mungkin tidak relevan untuk Malaysia. Namun, kita juga boleh mengalami cuaca panas yang melampau, terutamanya di kawasan-kawasan seperti pantai timur atau selatan yang lebih panas. Jika MetMalaysia mengeluarkan amaran cuaca panas melampau, ia akan diberitahu melalui media massa, aplikasi cuaca, atau laman web rasmi mereka. Ia adalah penting untuk sentiasa memeriksa maklumat cuaca terkini dari sumber yang dipercayai untuk memastikan keselamatan diri dan keluarga.

source: A recent scientific review, involving more than 300,000 people across several previous studies, has revealed that inadequate social networking and frequent isolation can have negative effects on a person's health equal to that caused by smoking and alcohol abuse.
domestication: Satu kajian saintifik baru-baru ini, yang melibatkan lebih daripada 300,000 orang di sepanjang kajian sebelum ini, telah mendedahkan bahawa rangkaian sosial yang tidak mencukupi dan pengasingan yang kerap boleh memberi kesan negatif ke atas kesihatan seseorang sama dengan yang disebabkan oleh merokok dan alkohol.
foreignization: A kajian saintifik terkini yang melibatkan lebih daripada 300,000 orang dari beberapa kajian sebelumnya telah mendedahkan bahawa kekurangan interaksi sosial dan pengasingan yang kerap boleh menyebabkan kesan negatif terhadap kesihatan seseorang yang setara dengan kesan merokok dan penyalahgunaan alkohol.

source: In Prince George a rally is planned to be held in front of the office of Education Minister Shirley Bond.

source: Wikinews asked Wikileaks why they didn't simply post a list of the sites which they felt were legal and add that all the others contained child porn, but Wikileaks felt "that would not be a fair representation of the material we obtained."

foreignization: Wikinews bertanya kepada Wikileaks mengapa mereka tidak sekadar memuat naik senarai laman web yang mereka rasa sah dan menambah bahawa semua yang lain mengandungi pornografi kanak-kanak, tetapi Wikileaks berpendapat "itu tidak akan menjadi representasi yang adil terhadap bahan yang kami peroleh."

domestication: Siasatan awal menyimpulkan bahawa bencana itu adalah letupan habuk yang dinyalakan di bawah silo, tetapi penyiasat-penyiasat dari Lembaga Keselamatan Kimia U.S. (CSB) dan Pentadbiran Kesihatan dan Keselamatan Pekerjaan (OSHA) telah menghalang siasatan lanjutan kerana OSHA mengisytiharkan ia tidak selamat selepas kemalangan.

source: In a statement, Senator John Kerry suggested recent publicity will cast light on Manning's situation and the balance between humane treatment and suicide prevention: "I think that a lot of people are now reviewing this very, very closely, people have weighed in, myself included, I think that analyses are being made.

foreignization: In satu kenyataan, Senator John Kerry mencadangkan bahawa publisiti terkini akan menyoroti situasi Manning dan keseimbangan antara rawatan kemanusiaan dan pencegahan bunuh diri: "Saya fikir ramai orang kini sedang menilai ini dengan sangat teliti, ramai telah memberikan pendapat, termasuk saya sendiri, saya fikir analisis sedang dibuat."

source: The advisory is scheduled to end at 10:00 a.m. (AKDT).

foreignization:
The advisory is scheduled to end at 10:00 a.m. (AKDT).


Step 1: Identify the key information in the sentence.
- The advisory is scheduled to end.
- The time is 10:00 a.m.
- The time zone is AKDT (Alaska Daylight Time).


Step 2: Translate the key information into Malay.
- "The advisory is scheduled to end" can be translated to "Pemberitahuan ini dijadualkan berakhir."
- "The time is 10:00 a.m." can be translated to "Waktu adalah 10:00 pagi."
- "The time zone is AKDT" can be translated to "Zon waktu adalah AKDT."


Step 3: Combine the translated phrases to form the complete Malay sentence.
"Pemberitahuan ini dijadualkan berakhir pada 10:00 pagi (AKDT)."


Final Answer: The advisory is scheduled to end at 10:00 a.m. (AKDT). → Pemberitahuan ini dijadualkan berakhir pada 10:00 pagi (AKDT).

foreignization:
Certainly! Here is the translation of the given text from English to Malay:

English: Currently the spill is being held within the Gulf of Mexico, however, as the spill grows each day it is at bigger risk of being picked up by the Loop Current.
Malay: Saat ini, tumpahan minyak itu sedang ditahan di Teluk Mexico, namun, seiring dengan pertumbuhan tumpahan minyak setiap hari, ia semakin berisiko untuk diambil oleh Arus Loop.

foreignization:
Certainly! Here is the translation of the given text from English to Malay:

English: Belief in witchcraft is widespread in the Kisii District of Nyanza Province and attacks against purported witches had happened before, but this week's attacks targeted an unusually large number of people.

source: McCartney "[w]as selected and approved [for a star] many years ago."
domestication: McCartney "[t]elah dipilih dan diperkenankan [untuk satu bintang] banyak tahun dahulu".
foreignization:
McCartney "[w]as selected and approved [for a star] many years ago."

**Terjemahan ke Bahasa Melayu:**
McCartney "[w]as selected and approved [for a star] many years ago."

**Penjelasan:**
- "McCartney" adalah nama seorang artis atau selebriti.
- "was selected and approved" bermaksud "telah dipilih dan diluluskan."
- "for a star" bermaksud "untuk sebuah bintang."
- "many years ago" bermaksud "banyak tahun yang lalu."

Jadi, terjemahan lengkapnya ialah: "McCartney telah dipilih dan diluluskan untuk sebuah bintang banyak tahun yang lalu."

source: This pattern continues although the Indian government has prohibited hospitals from disclosing the gender of an unborn child.

foreignization:
This pattern continues although the Indian government has prohibited hospitals from disclosing the gender of an unborn child.

Step 1: Identify the main subject and verb of the sentence.
- Main subject: This pattern
- Main verb: continues

Step 2: Identify the subordinate clause and its verb.
- Subordinate clause: Although the Indian government has prohibited hospitals from disclosing the gender of an unborn child.
- Verb: has prohibited

Step 3: Translate the main subject and verb into Malay.
- This pattern: Pola ini
- continues: berterusan

Step 4: Translate the subordinate clause and its verb into Malay.
- Although the Indian government has prohibited hospitals from disclosing the gender of an unborn child: Walaupun kerajaan India telah melarang hospital daripada mendedahkan jantina kanak-kanak yang belum lahir

Step 5: Combine the translated main subject, verb, and subordinate clause into a complete Malay sentence.
- Pola ini berterusan walaupun kerajaan India telah melarang hospital daripada mendedahkan jantina kanak-kanak yang belum lahir

Final Answer: Pola ini berterusan walaupun kerajaan India telah melarang hospital daripada mendedahkan jantina kanak-kanak yang belum lahir.

source: According to the Associated Press, John B. Bellinger III, a State Department legal advisor and participant during the hearings at Geneva, said of the recommendation to close the base that, "one, seems to be beyond their mandate; two, legally wrong to say that the existence of Guantanamo is a per se violation of the convention; and, three, a not very practical recommendation given that they say that it ought to be closed but that individuals can't be sent back to a large number of countries."

Bellinger III, seorang penasihat undang-undang Jabatan Negara dan peserta pada perbicaraan di Geneva, berkata tentang cadangan untuk menutup pangkalan itu, "satu, nampaknya berada di luar mandat mereka; dua, secara undang-undang salah untuk mengatakan bahawa kewujudan Guantanamo adalah satu pelanggaran perjanjian secara mutlak; dan, tiga, cadangan yang tidak praktikal diberikan bahawa mereka mengatakan ia perlu ditutup tetapi individu tidak boleh dihantar kembali ke banyak negara."

source: Barker told her to "shut up."
domestication: Barker memanggilnya supaya "berdiam".
foreignization:
Barker menyuruhnya "diam."


Step 1: Identify the main verb in the sentence. The main verb is "told."

Step 2: Translate the main verb to Malay. The translation of "told" is "menyuruh."

Step 3: Identify the object of the verb. The object is "her" (dia).

Step 4: Translate the object to Malay. The translation of "her" is "dia."

Step 5: Identify the direct object of the verb. The direct object is "to shut up" ( "shut up").

Step 6: Translate the direct object to Malay. The translation of "shut up" is "diam."

Step 7: Combine the translated verbs and objects to form the Malay sentence. The sentence is "Barker menyuruhnya diam."


Answer: Barker menyuruhnya diam.

- The incident happened at 18.15 local time.
- The UTC time is 13.45.

Step 2: Translate the key information into Malay.
- 18.15 local time = 18.15 masa tempatan
- 13.45 UTC = 13.45 UTC

- The incident happened at about 18.15 local time (13.45 UTC).

English: Perbelanjaan infrastruktur termasuk A$12.9 juta untuk menyambungkan lebih banyak kerajaan tempatan kepada rangkaian broadband nasional, A$40 juta untuk infrastruktur kerajaan tempatan lain, pelaburan dalam sistem rel rentas sungai Brisbane dan sistem rel metro Melbourne.

source: IMD's bulletins contain information on the actual and predicted centre, intensity and movement of the cyclone, as well as sea conditions and maximum wind speeds around the cyclone centre.

source: To stop the fire from spreading to other nearby buildings, which are closely grouped together, they were forced to pull some of them down using nothing but man power.

To stop the fire from spreading to other nearby buildings, which are closely grouped together, they were forced to pull some of them down using nothing but man power.

source: Selamat, a 47-year-old former bus mechanic and a father of 5, was once accused of plotting to hijack a plane and crash it into Singapore's international airport.

source: His flight subsequent to the attack proved futile as phone records led police to Rome, and a raid on his brother's apartment, where he was captured.

source: Each different editor who makes changes to the article has a distinct color, allowing for that editor's text to be tracked over time.

source: The international legislation he was referring to is probably the Convention on International Civil Aviation, which stipulates that accident reports and related material, specifically transcripts of interviews, communications with crew and cockpit voice recorder and flight data recorder (collectively known as black boxes) readouts, must not be used for any purpose other than determining the cause of an accident or incident.

foreignization: The legislation antarabangsa yang dia rujuk mungkin adalah Konvensyen Antarabangsa Tentang Penerbangan Awam Sivil, yang menetapkan bahawa laporan kemalangan dan bahan berkaitan, khususnya transkrip temu bual, komunikasi dengan kru dan rakaman suara kokpit serta rakaman data penerbangan (secara kolektif dikenali sebagai kotak hitam), tidak boleh digunakan untuk tujuan lain selain menentukan punca kemalangan atau insiden.

foreignization: It warned that a cyclone with wind speeds of 180 kilometres per hour would cross the southwest coast of Myanmar sometime between 8pm and midnight on the night of the 2 May.

source: Israel confirmed the release on Saturday, but delayed it until Tuesday for an Israeli court appeal by victims' families to prevent it.
domestication: Israel mengesahkan pembebasan itu pada hari Sabtu, tetapi ditangguhkan sehingga hari Selasa untuk rayuan mahkamah Israel oleh keluarga mangsa untuk mencegahnya.
foreignization: Israel mengesahkan pelepasan pada Sabtu, tetapi menangguhkannya sehingga Selasa untuk rayuan mahkamah oleh keluarga mangsa untuk mencegahnya.

source: On August 11th, the Russian Defence Ministry announced that troops are leaving the military base in Senaki, and preparing to head back to Abkhazia.
domestication: Pada 11 Ogos, Kementerian Pertahanan Rusia mengumumkan bahawa angkatan tentera akan meninggalkan pangkalan tentera di Senaki, dan bersiap sedia untuk kembali ke Abkhazia.
foreignization: On 11 Ogos, Kementerian Pertahanan Rusia mengumumkan bahawa tentera sedang meninggalkan pangkalan tentera di Senaki dan bersedia untuk kembali ke Abkhazia.

source: Rippon and Zagame are expected to be recovered next week and should be ready for London.

source: In the second half Scotland continued to dominate and Allister Hogg scored two more tries to complete his hat-trick.
domestication: Dalam separuh masa kedua, Scotland terus mendominasi dan Allister Hogg menambah dua lagi serangan mata untuk melengkapkan hat-trick beliau.
foreignization: In separuh kedua, Scotland terus mendominasi dan Allister Hogg mencetak dua percubaan lagi untuk melengkapkan hat-tricknya.

source: Currently ranked 23rd in the world, she entered the tournament in the shadow of her sister, Serena Williams.
domestication: Kini menduduki tempat ke-23 di dunia, dia memasuki kejohanan di bayangan kakaknya, Serena Williams.
foreignization:
Certainly! Here is the translation of the given text from English to Malay:

English: Currently ranked 23rd in the world, she entered the tournament in the shadow of her sister, Serena Williams.
Malay: Saat ini berada di ranking ke-23 di dunia, dia memasuki kejohanan itu di bawah bayang-bayang kakaknya, Serena Williams.

This translation maintains the original meaning and context of the sentence, conveying the idea that the person entered the tournament while being overshadowed by her famous sister, Serena Williams.

source: They, then, give them to you on arrival, it added.
domestication: Mereka, kemudian, memberikan ia kembali semasa ketibaan, tambahnya.
foreignization:
They, then, give them to you on arrival, it added.  
Malay: Mereka, kemudian, memberi mereka kepada anda pada ketibaan, ia ditambah.

source: The use of the word "share" in the article means that it is the rough percentage of viewers with their sets on at that hour tuning into a certain program.

foreignization: The use of the word "share" in the article means that it is the rough percentage of viewers with their sets on at that hour tuning into a certain program.

source: For most of the eight months he has been held there, Manning has been required to sleep only in his boxer shorts because he has been under "prevention of injury watch," according to First Lieutenant Brian Villiard, a spokesman for the Quantico facility.
domestication: Bagi kebanyakan daripada lapan bulan dia ditahan di sana, Manning telah dikehendaki untuk tidur dengan seluar dalam pendeknya sahaja kerana dia diperhatikan di bawah "kawalan mencegah kecederaan," menurut Leftenan Brian Villiard, jurucakap kemudahan Quantico itu.

source: Madagascar has the third biggest coral system in the world.

source: "When I am President, the only economic policy I shall pursue is to be frugal with the funds of the United States."

source: As the start date of the former Iraqi leader's trial approaches, the chief judge of the tribunal has stated that the fate of Saddam Hussein will be broadcast on live television.

source: "I don't know if there are any more bodies down there, we just have to wait."

foreignization: The reason for the widespread power outages has been the combination of very heavy water laden snow accumulating on the trees that still have most of their leaves.

source: In November, 2006, Mr Clarke was released from prison and placed into home detention for kidnapping and raping a 15-year-old girl in 1997.

source: The group of scientists was led by Sergio Campana of the Italian National Institute for Astrophysics and Alicia Soderberg, a graduate student at Caltech in Pasadena, California.

source: A panel of five international experts will define the new land and maritime borders and could force Croatia to cede some of the sea it views as its own.

source: You might go through life feeling unfulfilled.

source: In 1968, he reflected upon the choice, noting that "It seemed quite logical."

foreignization:
In 1968, dia merenungkan pilihan itu dan menyatakan, "Ia nampak sangat logik."


This translation maintains the original meaning and context of the sentence, conveying the idea that the choice seemed logical to the person in 1968. The Malay translation uses the word "logik" to describe the logical nature of the choice, which is a direct translation of the English word "logical." The sentence structure is also preserved, with the subject "dia" (he) and the verb "merenungkan" (reflected upon) used to convey the action of contemplating the choice. The phrase "Ia nampak sangat logik" (It seemed very logical) effectively captures the original meaning and tone of the English sentence.

source: In the days leading up to the rally, police had warned that the demonstration could attract up to 20,000 people and turn into a full scale riot, however these fears were not realised.
domestication: Sebelum perhimpunan diadakan, polis telah memberi amaran yang perhimpunan itu boleh menarik seramai 20,000 orang dan bertukar menjadi rusuhan skala penuh, tetapi kebimbangan itu tidak menjadi kenyataan.
foreignization:
Ini adalah terjemahan yang tepat untuk ayat tersebut dalam Bahasa Melayu:

"Dalam hari-hari sebelum perhimpunan, polis telah memberi amaran bahawa demonstrasi itu boleh menarik sehingga 20,000 orang dan berubah menjadi rusuhan besar, namun ketakutan ini tidak menjadi kenyataan."

Penjelasan:
- "In the days leading up to the rally" diterjemahkan sebagai "Dalam hari-hari sebelum perhimpunan."
- "police had warned" diterjemahkan sebagai "polis telah memberi amaran."
- "the demonstration could attract up to 20,000 people" diterjemahkan sebagai "demonstrasi itu boleh menarik sehingga 20,000 orang."
- "and turn into a full scale riot" diterjemahkan sebagai "dan berubah menjadi rusuhan besar."
- "however these fears were not realised" diterjemahkan sebagai "namun ketakutan ini tidak menjadi kenyataan."

Jadi, terjemahan lengkapnya adalah: "Dalam hari-hari sebelum perhimpunan, polis telah memberi amaran bahawa demonstrasi itu boleh menarik sehingga 20,000 orang dan berubah menjadi rusuhan besar, namun ketakutan ini tidak menjadi kenyataan."

Step 1: Understand the sentence structure and meaning.

foreignization: In 1991 dan 1992, empat daripada enam republik Yugoslavia menyatakan kemerdekaan, tetapi dua daripadanya, Serbia dan Montenegro, kekal bersama.

source: The support for MoinMoin wikis comes via a plugin, so the tool may be extensible to the native interfaces of other wiki engines in the future.

foreignization: The support for MoinMoin wikis comes via a plugin, so the tool may be extensible to the native interfaces of other wiki engines in the future.

source: Natelashvili himself was threatened with arrest by a government member and is facing money laundering charges, as are other members of the opposition.

foreignization: Natasha sendiri diancam dengan penangkapan oleh seorang anggota pemerintah dan menghadapi tuduhan pencucian uang, seperti juga anggota oposisi lainnya.

source: When asked by Terry Forrest, counsel for AWB executives what the point of sending intelligence to his department when it was never read, Mr Downer conceded that it was "physically impossible" to read it all.
domestication: Apabila ditanya oleh Terry Forest, peguam pembela untuk eksekutif AMB tentang penghantaran perisikan ke jabatannya walaupun ia tidak pernah dibaca, Encik Downer mengakui bahawa ia "mustahil secara fizikal" untuk membaca kesemuanya.

source: Today, Ryanair announced a 27% drop in pre-tax profits in its third quarter net profits.

foreignization: Hari ini, Ryanair mengumumkan penurunan 27% dalam keuntungan sebelum cukai dalam keuntungan bersih suku ketiga mereka.

source: “WFP couldn’t do this alone, so we work with the Ministry of Agriculture and UNICEF to dig wells and the UN Food and Agriculture Organization for vegetable gardens,” said Benoit Thiry, Director, WFP in Djibouti.
domestication: "WFP tidak mungkin dapat membuatnya berseorangan, jadi kami bekerja dengan Menteri Petanian dan UNICEF untuk mngorek telaga dan Organisasi Pertanian dan Makanan UN untuk taman sayur," kata Benoit Thiry, Pengarah WFP di Djabouti.
foreignization: “WFP tidak dapat melakukannya sendiri, jadi kami bekerjasama dengan Kementerian Pertanian dan UNICEF untuk menggali sumur dan dengan Organisasi Pangan dan Pertanian PBB untuk kebun sayur,” kata Benoit Thiry, Pengarah WFP di Djibouti.

source: Luiz Fernando da Costa, known as Fernando Beira-Mar or Fernandinho Beira-Mar, is one of the biggest drug dealers of Latin America according to police.

source: The reactor to be built is the second proposed power plant in the same location; a separate proposal for a four-reactor complex built by a Russian-led consortium was rejected by a Turkish court last year.

source: It was said to be unlikely that the bone was Holloway's as there is no physical evidence that she was murdered.

source: Access from King's Cross is impossible, so workers are taking the longer route from Russell Square station to get to the front of the train.

source: March promoters are vowing to bring one million people onto the streets to protest the People's Republic of China's "anti-secession" law aimed at thwarting Taiwan independence.
domestication: Promoter perarakan berjanji untuk membawa satu juta orang ke jalan-jalan untuk membantah undang-undang "anti- pemisahan" Republik Rakyat China yang bertujuan untuk menggagalkan kemerdekaan Taiwan.

source: In what is described as a genuine incident, a female member of the public had called for help saying a street gang had broken a window.

source: "The Sierra Leone government has publicly stated its commitment to abolish user fees, and the UK government and other donors have promised to help," said Seco Gerard, advisor at Medecins Sans Frontieres’s analysis and advocacy unit.

source: In a first, the Shuttle also performed a slow back-flip in some 180 m from the ISS enabling the two-man crew of the space station to take high-resolution images of the underside of the Orbiter.

source: Forecasters say the storm changed course before striking the Cagayan province in the northern part of the country.

source: According to the lawsuit, filed with both the United States District Court in Delaware and the United States International Trade Commission, HTC violated Apple patents pertaining to both multi-touch gestures, which allow users to interact with a device's touchscreen using multiple fingers, as well as patents involving more general touch features.

source: Ahead of talks with President Nicolas Sarkozy last Friday in Paris, he called upon France to be more involved in the Middle East peace process, after expressing disappointment with Barack Obama's performance and lack of action plan; in an interview with Le Figaro he called the United States the "weak link".

foreignization:
Ahead of talks with President Nicolas Sarkozy last Friday in Paris, he called upon France to be more involved in the Middle East peace process, after expressing disappointment with Barack Obama's performance and lack of action plan; in an interview with Le Figaro he called the United States the "weak link".

source: The blaze started burning last Wednesday north of Los Angeles.

The blaze started burning last Wednesday north of Los Angeles.

Step 1: Identify the key elements of the sentence.
- The blaze (subject)
- Started burning (verb)
- Last Wednesday (time)
- North of Los Angeles (location)

Step 2: Translate each element into Malay.
- The blaze = Kebakaran
- Started burning = bermula membakar
- Last Wednesday = minggu lalu
- North of Los Angeles = di utara Los Angeles

Step 3: Combine the translated elements into a Malay sentence.
Kebakaran bermula membakar minggu lalu di utara Los Angeles.

Final Answer: Kebakaran bermula membakar minggu lalu di utara Los Angeles.

source: They would lead by 26 points early in the second half before University gained the momentum.
domestication: Mereka mendahului dengan 26 mata di separuh masa awal sebelum University memperoleh momentum.
foreignization:
They would lead by 26 points early in the second half before University gained the momentum.

Step 1: Identify the key elements of the sentence.
- They would lead by 26 points early in the second half.
- Before University gained the momentum.

Step 2: Translate each element into Malay.
- They would lead by 26 points early in the second half = Mereka akan memimpin dengan 26 mata awal dalam separuh kedua.
- Before University gained the momentum = sebelum University mendapat momentum.

Step 3: Combine the translated elements to form the Malay sentence.
- Mereka akan memimpin dengan 26 mata awal dalam separuh kedua sebelum University mendapat momentum.

Final Answer: Mereka akan memimpin dengan 26 mata awal dalam separuh kedua sebelum University mendapat momentum.

source: Their most visible tactic has been the occupation of mostly privately-held plantations and landholdings, sometimes armed with carving knifes and scythes.

source: Although only two are required for normal operation, and the Shuttle can be flown with one, NASA elected to maintain full redundancy.
